title: PyPI contract authority
notes: Record Python package as an external conformance source.

title: Crates contract authority
notes: Record Rust crate as an external conformance source.

title: Contract version pin policy
notes: Define accepted package versions and drift behavior.

title: Contract schema draft policy
notes: Track schema-draft compatibility as a release concern.

title: Python and Rust contract parity evidence
notes: Require import/build/version parity evidence before certification claims.

title: Contract conformance release gate
notes: Block promotion only after this feature is implemented and wired.

title: REST binding projection
notes: Project concrete REST protos to contract binding rest.

title: JSON-RPC binding projection
notes: Project JSON-RPC protos to contract binding jsonrpc.

title: HTTP stream binding projection
notes: Project HTTP stream protos to contract binding http.stream.

title: SSE binding projection
notes: Project SSE protos to contract binding sse.

title: WebSocket binding projection
notes: Project WebSocket protos to contract binding websocket.

title: WebTransport binding projection
notes: Project WebTransport proto to contract binding webtransport.

title: Exchange normalization
notes: Normalize tigrbl exchange vocabulary to contract exchanges.

title: Protocol scope map
notes: Map tigrbl proto scopes to binding and ASGI scope type.

title: Request family capability
notes: Govern request-family legality and capability projection.

title: Session family capability
notes: Govern long-lived session capability.

title: Message family capability
notes: Govern discrete logical message capability.

title: Stream family capability
tigrbl_surface: HTTP stream; SSE; WebTransport stream paths
notes: Govern stream input and output capability.

title: Datagram family capability
notes: Govern datagram capability as WebTransport-only unless contract changes.

title: Family capabilities scope extension
notes: Populate request/session/message/stream_in/stream_out/datagram booleans.

title: Request-family subevents
notes: Track request-family subevents as governed rows.

title: Session-family subevents
notes: Track session-family subevents as governed rows.

title: Message-family subevents
notes: Track message-family subevents as governed rows.

title: Stream-family subevents
notes: Track stream-family subevents as governed rows.

title: Datagram-family subevents
notes: Track datagram-family subevents as governed rows.

title: Binding subevent legality matrix
notes: Enforce binding-to-subevent legality from the contract package.

title: Family subevent legality matrix
notes: Enforce family-to-subevent legality from the contract package.

title: Binding family legality matrix
notes: Enforce binding-to-family legality from the contract package.

title: HTTP scope shape
notes: Project HTTP ASGI scope into ContractScope.

title: WebSocket scope shape
notes: Project WebSocket ASGI scope into ContractScope.

title: WebTransport scope shape
notes: Project WebTransport scope into ContractScope.

title: Lifespan scope shape
notes: Govern lifespan as lifecycle scope rather than normal op dispatch.

title: Transport metadata scope extension
notes: Attach binding/network/secure/alpn/tls/framing metadata.

title: Family capabilities scope extension
notes: Expose per-scope family capabilities.

title: HTTP event shape
notes: Project HTTP ASGI events into ContractEvent.

title: WebSocket event shape
notes: Project WebSocket ASGI events into ContractEvent.

title: WebTransport event shape
notes: Project WebTransport ASGI events into ContractEvent.

title: Emit complete event shape
notes: Project transport completion into ContractEvent.

title: Ingress scope normalization atom
notes: Normalize ASGI scope before dispatch.

title: Ingress event normalization atom
notes: Normalize inbound ASGI events before dispatch.

title: Dispatch binding-family legality atom
notes: Reject illegal binding/family combinations before op resolution.

title: Dispatch subevent legality atom
notes: Reject illegal subevents before semantic execution.

title: Wire-in payload shape atom
notes: Decode request/message/stream/datagram input according to contract family.

title: Wire-out payload shape atom
notes: Encode semantic result into contract event payload shape.

title: Egress event projection atom
notes: Build legal outbound transport events.

title: Emit completion event atom
notes: Emit or record accepted_by_runtime and flushed_to_transport completion.

title: Error event projection atom
notes: Convert runtime failures into legal transport-specific error events.

title: Ingress phase obligations
notes: Ingress phase must leave normalized scope/event context.

title: Dispatch phase obligations
notes: Dispatch phase must leave validated binding/family/subevent or fail.

title: Wire phase obligations
notes: Wire phases must preserve contract payload shape.

title: Egress phase obligations
notes: Egress phase must create legal outbound event shape.

title: Emit phase obligations
notes: Emit phase must send or queue valid transport output.

title: POST_EMIT phase obligations
notes: POST_EMIT must represent transport completion rather than handler completion.

title: Error phase obligations
notes: Error phase must project legal failure outputs.

title: Raw ASGI received stage
notes: Represent context before contract normalization.

title: Scope normalized stage
notes: Represent context after ContractScope projection.

title: Event normalized stage
notes: Represent context after ContractEvent projection.

title: Binding matched stage
notes: Represent context after concrete proto maps to contract binding.

title: Family validated stage
notes: Represent context after binding/family legality succeeds.

title: Subevent validated stage
notes: Represent context after subevent legality succeeds.

title: Operation resolved stage
notes: Represent context after contract-valid dispatch resolves an op.

title: Transport encoded stage
notes: Represent context after semantic result becomes transport output.

title: Emit completed stage
notes: Represent context after transport completion is observed.

title: Request response phase chain
notes: Required chain for rest and jsonrpc request/response flows.

title: Server stream phase chain
notes: Required chain for http.stream and stream-like SSE output.

title: Session message phase chain
notes: Required chain for WebSocket, WebTransport, and SSE session/message flows.

title: Stream phase chain
notes: Required chain for chunked inbound/outbound stream behavior.

title: Datagram phase chain
notes: Required chain for WebTransport datagram behavior.

title: Lifespan phase chain
notes: Required lifecycle chain outside normal OpSpec dispatch.

title: Contract error phase chain
notes: Required chain for legal error projection.

title: Binding-sensitive edge atoms
notes: Inject binding-specific atoms at ingress, dispatch, egress, emit, and error edges.

title: Operation binding projection
notes: Make each op binding projectable to contract binding.

title: Operation family intent
notes: Declare whether an op serves request, session, message, stream, or datagram intent.

title: Operation stream intent
notes: Govern ops that consume or produce stream semantics.

title: Operation message intent
notes: Govern ops that consume or produce message semantics.

title: Operation datagram intent
notes: Govern ops that consume or produce datagram semantics.

title: Transport-neutral operation core
notes: Keep semantic ops independent from concrete transport dispatch.

title: Lifespan boundary
notes: Govern lifespan separately from request/session/message op dispatch.

title: Startup lifecycle handling
notes: Define startup behavior if lifespan is included in the contract target.

title: Shutdown lifecycle handling
notes: Define shutdown behavior if lifespan is included in the contract target.
